question: Will I reach 1,175,000 Energy Points on Khan Academy by the end of May?
textDescription:
At the time of making this market, I am at 988,491. 

This market resolves YES if I reach 1,175,000  Energy Points on Khan Academy by 11:59 PM EST on May 31, 2026. Resolution will be verified by checking my Khan Academy profile at https://www.khanacademy.org/profile/wsgcuhladoo. The market resolves NO if my total Energy Points remain below 1,175,000  at the deadline.

Background

Energy Points measure effort on Khan Academy, with learners earning more by pushing the edge of their knowledge. Users earn 75 Energy Points for each problem answered correctly in a skill for the first time, and 50 points for each problem answered correctly in a mastery challenge. Videos watched for the first time earn 750 Energy Points plus 100 bonus points for completion. Energy Points unlock avatars and backgrounds on your profile and indicate dedication and progress.

This background was generated by AI.
